MINI MINUTES: No Appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT'S BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON Motion To Dismiss Action IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 15, 2014 ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk N. Bautista, Not Reported, (501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-12-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Lisa Bowman, Esq. of Bryan Cave, (415-675-3400), for Bank of New York Mellon, Defendant and moving party.
Bernard J. Maryanski, Esq., Attorney at Law, (650-697-5524), SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR Lucila Gonzalez, Plaintiff and opposing party.

Court denies Defendant's request for continuance of this hearing. Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND to amend Plaintiff's eight causes of action to address in good faith all issues raised by demurrer. Plaintiff shall file an amended complaint within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
